nodes.label: 1. companyId derived from authenticated session/route — NEVER from request body
nodes.norm_label: 1. companyid derived from authenticated session/route — never from request body

nodes.label: 2. Every query/mutation takes TenantContext (compile-time enforced, no defaults)
nodes.norm_label: 2. every query/mutation takes tenantcontext (compile-time enforced, no defaults)

nodes.label: 3. Composite foreign keys at DB level prevent cross-tenant relationships
nodes.norm_label: 3. composite foreign keys at db level prevent cross-tenant relationships

nodes.label: 4. Opaque server-side sessions (not JWT-in-cookie) with revocation + pepper

nodes.label: 6. Explicit farm_access_mode enum (never inferred from absence of rows)

nodes.label: 7. Farm scope enforced on EVERY query (restricted users get assigned farms only)

nodes.label: 8. Outbox pattern for all email/notification/billing side effects

nodes.label: 9. Atomic quota enforcement via locked company_usage_current row in same tx as resource
